zh.Stourton, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓
英國英格蘭爾斯托雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander de Stourton於大約1165年出生在英國爾維拉爾時，他的父親William de Stourton17歲，母親Mrs. William de Stourton14歲。他和Amabilis De Sylvester至少有4個女兒。他去世於大約1210年在他的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander de Stourton于大约1165年出生在英国爾維拉爾时，他的父亲William de Stourton17岁，母亲Mrs. William de Stourton14岁。他和Amabilis De Sylvester至少有4个女儿。他去世于大约1210年在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander de Stourton was born about 1165, in Wirral, Cheshire, England, his father, William de Stourton, was 17 and his mother, Mrs. William de Stourton, was 14. He had at least 4 daughters with Amabilis De Sylvester. He died about 1210, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander de Stourton est né environ 1165, à Wirral, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Stourton, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William de Stourton, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 filles avec Amabilis De Sylvester. Il est décédé environ 1210, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander de Stourton um 1165 in Wirral, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Stourton 17 und seine Mutter Mrs. William de Stourton 14. Er hatte mit Amabilis De Sylvester mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1210 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Stourton è nato il circa 1165 nel Wirral, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William de Stourton, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William de Stourton, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figlie con Amabilis De Sylvester. Morì circa 1210, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander de Stourtonが約1165年にイギリスチェシュアイアウィラルで生まれた時，父William de Stourtonは17歳，母Mrs. William de Stourtonは14歳であった。彼はAmabilis De Sylvesterとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1210年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander de Stourton(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 체실르 위럴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Stourton(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William de Stourton(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Amabilis De Sylvester(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1210년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Stourton nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Wirral, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Stourton, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William de Stourton, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Amabilis De Sylvester. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1210, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander de Stourton родился около 1165 г. в местности вирраль, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Stourton было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William de Stourton, 14. У него было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Amabilis De Sylvester. Он умер около 1210 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander de Stourton nació aproximadamente 1165, en Wirral, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Stourton, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Mrs. William de Stourton, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Amabilis De Sylvester. Murió aproximadamente 1210, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
